calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: R. Edwards/E. Estacio, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Rian Krohn, Esq. for Plaintiff: Alan Fong, present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Victor Worden 11 as follows:
Principal $34,488.30
Attorney Fees $ 660.00
Interest $ 10,102.05
Costs $ 463.30
for a total of $45,713.65

Judgment signed in open court.
